programme.title: Kentucky Roses
programme.desc: A greenhouse worker and the son of Churchill Downs' CEO form an unlikely pair, coming together to save the Kentucky Derby rose blanket and uncovering a generational love story along the way.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a single mother and a professional football player when they coincidentally meet again on her daughter's flag football field.

programme.title: The Love Club Moms: Tory
programme.desc: Tory, a publishing powerhouse, gives up on dating and adopts a baby girl. Her friends help her find and hire a nanny, Finn, who could be the partner she was looking for.

programme.title: The Love Club Moms: Jo
programme.desc: A school principal's skills are put to the test when a new student lands in her office for detention. When she learns the boy's father is her high school flame Ryan, Jo's world is thrown for a loop.

programme.title: A Royal Setting
programme.desc: Ruby, a world-renowned gemologist is hired by Prince Luca to restore the crown jewels, and design his crown challenging tradition and complicating his relationship with his mother, the queen.

programme.title: The Way to You
programme.desc: New Yorkers Emma and Conrad agree to help each other find their missed connections after a subway blackout. Their search might lead to love, but not where either of them expects to find it.

programme.title: Mid-Love Crisis
programme.desc: On the eve of turning 50, Mindy Quinn finds herself doing the most unexpected thing: rekindling a romance that ended 30 years ago.

programme.title: Hearts of Spring
programme.desc: A famous blogger falls for a single father, not realizing that he is the same reader who criticized her advice online.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Just One Kiss
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a professor and a lounge singer after their respective mothers hatch a scheme to set them up.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age -- and sometimes where they least expect it.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Way to You
programme.desc: New Yorkers Emma and Conrad agree to help each other find their missed connections after a subway blackout. Their search might lead to love, but not where either of them expects to find it.

programme.title: Kentucky Roses
programme.desc: A greenhouse worker and the son of Churchill Downs' CEO form an unlikely pair, coming together to save the Kentucky Derby rose blanket and uncovering a generational love story along the way.

programme.title: Hope Valley: 1874
programme.desc: A young fugitive holds Rebecca and Tom hostage.

programme.title: The Way Home
programme.desc: Kat and Elliot plan a romantic getaway, while Alice tries to gather more clues; Del and Sam get a surprise visit from Elliot's father, Vic.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Five-year-old Saroo gets lost on a train which takes him thousands of miles across India, away from home and family. Saroo must learn to survive alone in Kolkata, before ultimately being adopted by an Australian couple. Twenty-five years later, armed with only a handful of memories, his unwavering determination, and a revolutionary technology known as Google Earth, he sets out to find his lost family and finally return to his first home.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Labor Day
programme.desc: At the tender age of 13, Henry Wheeler (Gattlin Griffith) grapples with the pains of adolescence while caring for his troubled, reclusive mother, Adele (Kate Winslet). One day while shopping for school supplies, Henry and Adele encounter Frank Chambers (Josh Brolin), an intimidating man but one who clearly needs their help. Frank convinces the two of them to take him into their home, but later it becomes clear that he is a convict who has escaped. Based on the novel by Joyce Maynard.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Five-year-old Saroo gets lost on a train which takes him thousands of miles across India, away from home and family. Saroo must learn to survive alone in Kolkata, before ultimately being adopted by an Australian couple. Twenty-five years later, armed with only a handful of memories, his unwavering determination, and a revolutionary technology known as Google Earth, he sets out to find his lost family and finally return to his first home.

programme.sub-title: Beef Baloney Dan and a Sarcastic No
programme.desc: Bonnie suspects that Adam's sponsor has an ulterior motive; Christy is caught in the middle when Tammy plays hard to get with chef Rudy.

programme.title: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A grade school teacher unwillingly finds herself falling for a widowed architect whose daughter is a new student in her class.

programme.title: When Love Springs
programme.desc: When Rory arrives at a bed-and-breakfast for her parents' vow renewal, she runs into the ex who broke her heart. Panicked, she pretends the bed-and-breakfast owner is her new boyfriend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: A daughter traveling with her widowed mother and a son traveling with his widower father meet on a cruise; the two decide that their musical parents would make the perfect couple try to engineer a romance only to falling in love themselves.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Walden arrives back in town, putting more pressure than ever on Lucas and the residents of Hope Valley; Bill comes up with a plan to stop Walden; new investors arrive from the oil company.

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Chanel comforts Johnny; EJ and Kristen trade accusations; Jada reveals Sophia's fate; Leo reaches out to Javi; Cat updates Rafe.

programme.sub-title: Texas Pete and a Parking Lot Carnival
programme.desc: Bonnie worries about her therapist when his life hits a serious rough patch; Christy comes to Marjorie's aid when she has trouble adjusting to a new job.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When the Cloud 9 founder's son makes a surprise visit, the employees struggle to accommodate his bold ideas; Garrett helps Dina navigate a tricky situation with Brian; Jonah and Sandra use social media to investigate some worrying news.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Some inside information leads the Cloud 9 employees to try to make the store seem perfect for one day.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Ava asks Janine to help her teach the after-school step class, but they don't agree on how to run the program; Gregory must reveal a secret when Barbara, Melissa and Jacob plan a pizza "eat-off.".

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Janine prepares to meet her struggling student's mother during open house, while the rest of the faculty uses the time to relax; Gregory is taken aback when he learns how Ava got the principal job; Barbara's daughter's visit creates a commotion.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: When the students start participating in a new online trend that causes disruption to the school, the teachers band together to put an end to it; Mr. Johnson provides comforting life advice to Gregory; the teachers finally meet Jacob's boyfriend.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: With the school board threatening to pull their funds, Janine and Gregory decide to help Ava out with her presentation; their plan is derailed when a curveball is thrown at Ava; Barbara offends Melissa when she doesn't agree with her blackmail idea.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Ava asks Janine to help her teach the after-school step class, but they don't agree on how to run the program; Gregory must reveal a secret when Barbara, Melissa and Jacob plan a pizza "eat-off.".

programme.desc: Janine prepares to meet her struggling student's mother during open house, while the rest of the faculty uses the time to relax; Gregory is taken aback when he learns how Ava got the principal job; Barbara's daughter's visit creates a commotion.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: When the students start participating in a new online trend that causes disruption to the school, the teachers band together to put an end to it; Mr. Johnson provides comforting life advice to Gregory; the teachers finally meet Jacob's boyfriend.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: With the school board threatening to pull their funds, Janine and Gregory decide to help Ava out with her presentation; their plan is derailed when a curveball is thrown at Ava; Barbara offends Melissa when she doesn't agree with her blackmail idea.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When the SoHo DMV lands a glossy magazine feature, Barb struggles with feeling overlooked, stirring up old insecurities she thought she'd left behind; Gregg and Vic go head-to-head in a competitive quest to earn their first positive review.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Needing to raise a large sum of money to pay the IRS, Sam and Jay agree to host a high-stakes poker game at the mansion; in an act of generosity, Sass and Pete gift Jay's recliner to the basement ghosts.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: When a Wall Street titan is murdered after giving away his fortune, Elsbeth suspects the victim's twin brother and business partner; the Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: Elsbeth organizes a book club to investigate a celebrated novelist who may have written the perfect crime.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: Danny offers to let Mindy buy the other condo he owns in his building, but becomes jealous when she starts dating Charlie (Tim Daly); Peter thinks the brain surgeon (Tracey Wigfield) he is dating may be too mature for him.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: When Mindy reads a description of an encounter a man had with her in New York, she thinks she has found her dream guy, which leads to a surprising reveal.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Murphy feels overwhelmed by the chaos and noise in the emergency room; Dr. Reznick struggles to keep her patients alive; Dr. Lim fights for her life.
